verificationNotes: Existence, release date and pricing/context ($0.25/$2 per 1M, 400K context) confirmed by live-fetching developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5-mini. Primary blog page returned 403 to direct fetch/was rate-limited on the fetch connector, so each result row was checked against secondary sources quoting the original figures. Confirmed exactly: AIME 91.1, GPQA 82.3, HLE 16.7, Aider polyglot 71.6. Could NOT independently confirm swe-bench (71), mmmu (81.6), or tau-bench (74.1) on any accessible source — those 3 rows were dropped per verification policy (never keep an unconfirmed number).
